name: AMES NATIONAL CORP
summary: Ames National Corporation is an Iowa bank holding company owning 100% of six community banks: First National Bank, State Bank & Trust Co., Boone Bank & Trust Co., Reliance State Bank, United Bank & Trust Co., and Iowa State Savings Bank. Operating in central, north-central, and south-central Iowa, the company offers commercial, agricultural, and residential lending, deposit accounts, wealth management, merchant card processing, cash management, safe deposit boxes, wire transfers, and trust services to small-to-medium sized businesses and individuals.

products.name: Commercial and Agricultural Loans
products.description: Short and medium-term commercial, agricultural, and real estate loans for businesses and farmers.

products.name: Residential Real Estate Loans
products.description: Residential mortgage loans including origination for sale into the secondary market.

products.name: Deposit Accounts
products.description: Checking, savings, money market, time deposits, certificates of deposit, and IRAs.

products.name: Wealth Management and Trust Services
products.description: Trust and wealth management services offered by five of the six bank subsidiaries.

products.name: Merchant Credit Card Processing
products.description: Merchant credit card processing services offered to business customers.

products.name: Cash Management Services
products.description: Cash management solutions including wire transfers, direct deposit, and ATM/video teller access.
